t_ch: 你将半碗列车锅全部吃了下去…你这也太能吃了吧！
t_en: You devour the remaining half of the Express Special... What an amazing appetite you have!

t_ch: 嗝，好撑。
t_en: Burp... So full...

t_ch: （看看翠缥色的布）
t_en: (Look at the emerald green fabric)

t_ch: 布匹上写着一行笔走游龙的仙舟文：古法草木染实验•零零肆号（低温冷却法）。暂借冰箱一用，抱歉。
t_en: There is a Xianzhou language note on the fabric written in bold, flowing calligraphy: Legacy Plant Dye experiment: #Nil-Nil-Four (low temperature cooling method). Using your refrigerator for a while, sorry.

t_ch: 丹恒老师，怎么连你也往我的冰箱里乱塞东西……
t_en: Master Dan Heng, even YOU are sticking random stuff into my refrigerator? How could you?

t_ch: （检查布匹）
t_en: (Inspect the fabric)

t_ch: 布匹上缝着一张色卡，用仙舟文写着「翠缥色」三个字，似乎是理想颜色的标的物。现在布匹的颜色，和色卡上的颜色一模一样。
t_en: There is a color card sewn onto the fabric with the Xianzhou word for "emerald verde" written on it. It's probably the color that the fabric is supposed to be. Right now, the color of the fabric matches the color card perfectly.

t_ch: 现在似乎「冷却」得刚刚好。帮他拿出来吧，免得实验失败。
t_en: It looks like it's reached the perfect "cooling" point. Why not take it out for him? You don't want his experiment to fail.

t_ch: （全部吃掉）
t_en: (Eat it all)

t_ch: 等等，这不能吃吧！…算了，拦着你做什么？开拓者可是银河中最自由的存在。
t_en: Wait, you can't eat that! ...Forget it, why try to hold you back? Trailblazers are the most uninhibited beings in the Cosmos.

t_ch: 你把翠缥色的布吃了下去。鬼知道你是怎么做到的。
t_en: You swallow the emerald verde fabric. Goodness knows how you did it.

t_ch: 嗝，好吃。
t_en: *burp* Tasty.

t_ch: 姑且算是处理完了。接下来…该给这个冰箱定点规矩了！
t_en: Well, that's that taken care of. Now... it's time to enforce some rules on this refrigerator!

t_ch: 之后再说。
t_en: Maybe later.

t_ch: 算了，现在没心思管这个。
t_en: Forget it. I'm not in the mood to deal with all of that.

t_ch: 还是看看冰箱里都被他们塞了什么东西吧……
t_en: Let's see what they've stuffed this refrigerator full of, shall we...?

t_ch: 姑且算是处理完了。接下来…该给这个冰箱定点规矩了！
t_en: Well, that's that taken care of. Now... it's time to enforce some rules on this refrigerator!

t_ch: 让我写个纸条贴在冰箱上——关于今后冰箱的使用……
t_en: I'll write a note to stick on this refrigerator... Regarding how it is to be used in the future...

t_ch: 请大家继续自由使用。
t_en: Please continue to use this as you please.

t_ch: 还是让大家继续随便用吧。都是家人，没必要多计较什么。
t_en: Why not let them keep using it as they want. We're all family here, and there's no need for petty squabbles.

t_ch: 为大家制定冰箱使用时间。
t_en: Set a period of time when people can use the refrigerator.

t_ch: 大家当然可以用我的冰箱，但还是需要规定一下每个人的使用时间。要是都像今天这样一股脑塞进来，就谁都没办法好好使用了。
t_en: You are all free to use my refrigerator, but I need to set specific times for each person. If we keep stuffing it full like that, no one will be able to use it properly.

t_ch: 是时候开始收费了。
t_en: It's time to start charging money.

t_ch: 亲兄弟也要明算账。用了我的冰箱，那就要给我交费，嘿嘿嘿～
t_en: There's a saying that goes, "don't mix family and business." If you use my fridge, prepare to fork out money for it. Heh heh~

t_ch: 好，以后就这么办吧！
t_en: Alright, these are the rules from now on!

t_ch: 你将《冰箱使用新规》贴在了冰箱上。
t_en: You place the New Refrigerator Use Guidelines notice on the refrigerator.

t_ch: 也许<color=#dbc291ff>明天</color>会收到大家对此的回复吧。
t_en: Maybe if you check <color=#dbc291ff>tomorrow</color>, people will have written replies to this.

t_ch: 走过冰箱时，你发现上面贴了一个便签。
t_en: As you walk past the refrigerator, you notice a note attached to it.

t_ch: （阅读便签）
t_en: (Read the note)

t_ch: 你打开冰箱，看到里面放着一个冰淇淋。这应该就是三月七的谢礼了。
t_en: As you open the refrigerator, you see an ice cream inside. This must be a thank-you gift from March 7th.

t_ch: 你打开冰箱，看到里面放着一盘菜。这应该就是丹恒的谢礼了。
t_en: As you open the refrigerator, you see a plate of vegetables inside. This must be a thank-you gift from Dan Heng.

t_ch: 你打开冰箱，看到里面放着…一张写着信用点数字兑换码的纸条？列车长为什么要把谢礼放到冰箱里……
t_en: As you open the refrigerator, you see... a piece of paper with a digital code to redeem credits? Why would the Conductor put this gift inside the refrigerator?

t_ch: 等等再看。
t_en: Check later.

t_ch: 不急着看。便签又不会自己跑掉。
t_en: There's no rush. It's not like the note is going to go running off on its own.

t_ch: 呼呼。瞧这蒸腾的水汽，湿漉漉的，我是怎么流落到这种荒凉地方来的呢？
t_en: *crackle* Look at the bubbling vapor... Everything is damp. How did I end up in this deserted place?

t_ch: 好害怕，我好不容易燃起的小小的灵智火花，不会就要这么熄灭了吧。善良的过路人，你能否施舍点柴火，助我燃烧得更长久些？
t_en: It took a long time for me to kindle this tiny spark of inspiration, and I'm afraid it will be extinguished! Kind stranger, will you give me some firewood so that I may burn a little longer?

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: 我…我本是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}神躯的碎片，呼呼，看过大地的漫长变迁，也能熟记每块岩石应在的位置。
t_en: I... I was once a fragment of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios's{RUBY_E#} divine body, watching the land transform over the years, and I remembered where every boulder was. *crackle*

t_ch: 后来…山岳崩塌，砾石奔散，兜兜转转不知过了多久，醒来时就到了这。
t_en: Then the mountains collapsed and the debris scattered everywhere. A long time passed, and I found myself here when I came to.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 耕耘必有收获，这是亘古不变的道理。呼呼，别担心，我会有好东西给你。
t_en: Hard work will always be rewarded. *crackle* Don't worry. I'll have something good for you.

t_ch: 呼呼，虽比不上初始的火种，但也能帮我再撑段时间了。感谢你，好心的人。
t_en: *crackle* This is no primordial Coreflame, but it will last me for a while. Thank you, kind soul.

t_ch: …饿，呼呼，我好饿啊！你究竟给了小火苗什么，让我感觉如此地空虚……
t_en: *crackle* ...Hungry. I'm starving! What did you give the poor little dim flame that made it feel so empty inside?

t_ch: 耕耘必有收获，这是亘古不变的道理。呼呼，别担心，我会有好东西给你。
t_en: Hard work will always be rewarded. *crackle* Don't worry. I'll have something good for you.

t_ch: 呼呼。这里不是我的归宿，想搬到干燥的地方去。
t_en: *crackle* This is not my home. I want to go somewhere dry.

t_ch: 呼呼…好讨厌潮湿。
t_en: *crackle* I hate getting wet.

t_ch: 呼呼…救救……
t_en: *crackle* Help...

t_ch: 呼呼…我感觉很难受……
t_en: *crackle* I feel terrible...

t_ch: 呼呼…空气真好。
t_en: *crackle* The air is great here.

t_ch: 呼呼…我的火要灭了……
t_en: *crackle* My fire... is about to go out...

t_ch: 呼呼…快逃，快逃……
t_en: *crackle* Run... Run away now...

t_ch: 呼呼…奇怪的人来了……
t_en: *crackle* A strange person.

t_ch: 呼呼…我有点晕……
t_en: *crackle* I am a little dizzy...

t_ch: 呼呼，感谢，遇见你真是太好了。我孤苦无依地躺在这好久，路过的人们络绎不绝，可谁都不愿停下来看我一眼！哎，世风日下啊……
t_en: *crackle* I'm very thankful to have met you. I was down on the ground for a long time, but no one stopped and paid me any mind! What has this world come to...

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: …我？呼呼，难道你看不出来吗？永不熄灭的灵火——说的就是我！
t_en: Me? Huh, you mean you can't tell? *crackle* I'm the everlasting spiritual flame!

t_ch: 我可不是普通的石头，我是有神性的石头，是从{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的身躯里掉下来的石头。呼呼，看在帮了忙的份上，就不跟你计较了。
t_en: I'm no ordinary rock. I am a rock with divinity, because I fell from the body of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. *crackle* Since you helped me, I'll let this one slide.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 呼呼，大地从不吝啬回报。这样吧，呈出令我满意的供品，我必将丰厚还于你。
t_en: *crackle* The earth always rewards those who sow. How about this? Make a satisfactory offering, and I will repay you abundantly.

t_ch: 收到收到。呼呼，还不错嘛，这便是给有心之人的回赠。拿好！
t_en: I've received your offering. Very nice. *crackle* Take my gift for your hard work, kind soul!

t_ch: …这个是可燃的吗？要是烧不起来的话，呼呼，给我再多也没用！
t_en: ...Is this flammable? If it doesn't burn, it's useless! *crackle*

t_ch: 呼呼，大地从不吝啬回报。这样吧，呈出令我满意的供品，我必将丰厚还于你。
t_en: *crackle* The earth always rewards those who sow. How about this? Make a satisfactory offering, and I will repay you abundantly.

t_ch: 呼呼。火焰还在燃烧啊，恰如我炙热的内心！
t_en: *crackle* The fire burns still, like my scorching heart!

t_ch: 呼呼！危险啊，摇摇欲坠的小火苗，差点就扑灭在这种不见天日的地方了。
t_en: *crackle* That was close. The dim flame was almost extinguished in this dark place.

t_ch: 是不是你救了我？呼呼，感谢你，路旁的所有石头都将吟诵你的名字，崖壁上的每块巨岩都雕刻着你的样子。你就是最高的山，最长的坡。
t_en: Did you save me? *crackle* You have my gratitude. All the stones by the road shall chant your name, and every boulder on the cliffs shall feature your visage. You are the highest mountain and the longest slope.

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: 我曾随{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}四处奔走，在沙砾间留下足迹，在沃土中播种无数，筑起高耸的山崖，掘出深邃的沟壑。
t_en: I once traveled everywhere with {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}. I left my footprints among the gravel, I sowed countless seeds in fertile soil, I built majestic cliffs, and I dug bottomless ravines.

t_ch: 可到如今，伟岸的神力不见踪影，我也只剩这微弱的小火苗了。
t_en: But now the divine powers have vanished, and I am nothing but a dim flame.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 呼呼。看这跳动的火焰，纯净而神秘，温暖而永不熄灭，是否会让你想要撷取一缕，时刻带在身边？献出些许供品，如此便有收获。
t_en: *crackle* Look at this dancing flame. Pure, mysterious, warm, and everlasting. Beholding such a feat, do you want to draw a sliver and take it along? Make an offering and you shall have it.

t_ch: 拿去吧。呼呼，待到那长夜降临，漆黑无光时，你自会明白它的用处。
t_en: Take it. *crackle* You will understand how to use it when the endless night descends and everything is shrouded in darkness.

t_ch: 好湿，好湿！小火苗讨厌潮乎乎的东西，赶快拿走！
t_en: The moisture! The dim flame hates things that are damp! Take it away!

t_ch: 呼呼。看这跳动的火焰，纯净而神秘，温暖而永不熄灭，是否会让你想要撷取一缕，时刻带在身边？献出些许供品，如此便有收获。
t_en: *crackle* Look at this dancing flame. Pure, mysterious, warm, and everlasting. Beholding such a feat, do you want to draw a sliver and take it along? Make an offering and you shall have it.

t_ch: 呼呼。我还要燃烧自己到什么时候？
t_en: *crackle* How much longer do I have to keep burning myself?

t_ch: 呼呼。你好啊，这里的风景可太美了，空气也很新鲜，我好喜欢这里。
t_en: *crackle* Greetings. The scenery here is beautiful, and the air is refreshing. I love it here.

t_ch: 要永远住在这吗？还要继续在旅途奔波吗？灵火不会回答，只是安静燃烧，但若是你向火中投入材料，或许会有未来的征兆显现。
t_en: Do you want to live here forever? Or do you want to keep journeying? The spiritual flame burns quietly and does not answer, but if you offer substance to the fire, you might have a glimpse of the future.

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}创造了这片土地，又在其中放置了一个小小的我，有什么用意吗？我会是宏伟预言的一部分吗？
t_en: {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} created this land, and placed tiny little me among it. What was the purpose? Will I be a part of the magnificent prophecy?

t_ch: 大地从不回答，只以收获回报。
t_en: The land does not answer, and it only repays with harvest.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 呼呼。想见到称心的果实，你得先播种。
t_en: *crackle* You must sow the seed if you want to taste the fruit.

t_ch: 很好的种子。呼呼。带走这个吧，这是你应有的收成。
t_en: A good seed. *crackle* Take it. This is the fruit you deserve.

t_ch: 这个真能播在地里吗？呼呼，你怕不是连吃的果实和种子都分不清楚吧？！
t_en: Can this really be planted? *crackle* Can you even tell if you're eating a fruit or a seed!?

t_ch: 呼呼。想见到称心的果实，你得先播种。
t_en: *crackle* You must sow the seed if you want to taste the fruit.

t_ch: 呼呼。有多久没听到大地的话语了呢？
t_en: *crackle* How long has it been since I heard words from the land?

t_ch: 呼呼。活了…我的火焰重新燃烧起来了！瞧啊，多么生机勃勃，多么耀眼！
t_en: *crackle* It's alive. My fire is burning again! Look at the brilliant vitality within!

t_ch: 这都是你的功劳，呼呼。让我想想，要是在过去，在山岳尚未崩解为无数碎石的时候，我该怎么奖励你，又该如何称颂你的功绩？
t_en: It's all thanks to you. Let me think. *crackle* In the past, before the mountains collapsed into countless pebbles, how would I have rewarded and praised you for your deeds?

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: 在起初，世界上没有天与地，空荡荡的一片，是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}从虚空中升起，为万物创造了凭依之所。
t_en: In the very beginning, there was no sky and land in the empty world. {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} rose from the void and created a place where life can sustain.

t_ch: 呼呼，这便是我的来历。无数的我化作基石，筑造山脉，构成了大地。
t_en: *crackle* This is how I came to be. Countless of me laid the foundation, built mountains, and became the land.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 当然。呼呼，表现出你的虔敬与诚意，大地自会有赠礼。
t_en: Of course. *crackle* Show your reverence and sincerity, and the land will reciprocate.

t_ch: 对，就是这个！呼呼，从我的火苗中拿走少许吧，你会用得到的。
t_en: Yes, that's it! *crackle* Take some of my flame. You'll need it later.

t_ch: 呼呼。你拿出的这点诚意，就算丢进火里都烧不了多久！
t_en: *crackle* Your so-called sincerity can't even strike a spark in the flame!

t_ch: 当然。呼呼，表现出你的虔敬与诚意，大地自会有赠礼。
t_en: Of course. *crackle* Show your reverence and sincerity, and the land will reciprocate.

t_ch: 呼呼。好想回到山里去啊。
t_en: *crackle* I want to return to the mountains.

t_ch: 呼呼。你找到我了，小火苗在闲逛，想寻个清净的安身地方。不喜欢这里，满是奇怪的味道，别停下，别回头，灵火会熄掉的。
t_en: *crackle* You found me. This dim flame wants to find somewhere pure to call home and it doesn't like this place because of the strange smell. Don't stop and don't turn back, or the spiritual flame will be extinguished.

t_ch: 路过的人，找到我的人，想要好东西。给我，给我。
t_en: You by the side of the road. You who have found me. I want something good. Give me something good.

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: 我，呼呼，{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的眷属，看过很多，活了很久，害怕黑夜，害怕湿气，害怕会熄灭。
t_en: *crackle* I, {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios'{RUBY_E#} Kin, have been the witness to plenty and been burning forever. I fear darkness, fret over dampness, and dread being extinguished.

t_ch: 喜欢石头，喜欢火焰，喜欢好东西。呼呼，给我，给我。
t_en: I like stones, I like fire, I like good things. *crackle* Give me. Give me. Give me.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 呼呼。有的，别担心，小火苗不会骗你，小火苗会在黑夜里守护你。
t_en: *crackle* Yes, worry not. The dim flame does not lie. The dim flame will protect you at night.

t_ch: 好。得到了想要的东西，小火苗更加强大了。给你，给你。
t_en: Good. Excellent and desired. The dim flame is stronger. Here, for you.

t_ch: 不要，不要。这个会让小火苗做噩梦，想要，更加柔软的东西。
t_en: No, no. This gives the dim flame nightmares. Something softer, please.

t_ch: 呼呼。小火苗不会骗你，小火苗会在黑夜里守护你。
t_en: *crackle* The dim flame does not lie. The dim flame will protect you at night.

t_ch: 呼呼。要是夜里迷路了，找不到光亮，就来找我。小火苗会帮你。
t_en: *crackle* If you are lost at night and there is no light, come find me. The dim flame will help you.

t_ch: 呼呼。你是谁？我的灵火已经所剩无几了，不能分给你！
t_en: *crackle* Who are you? My spiritual flame is dwindling. Sharing is off the table!

t_ch: 除非…除非你能给即将熄灭的篝火添加薪柴，能让火焰燃烧得更加猛烈，呼呼，才有可能从我手中拿走些许，否则…别想靠近！
t_en: Unless... Unless you can add firewood to the dying fire, and make it burn ferociously. *crackle* Then you can take your share. Otherwise, stay away!

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}亲手雕琢了我的身体，又拿火种为我点燃灵智。呼呼，漫长岁月里，我始终守护着小小的火苗。
t_en: It was {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} that sculpted me, and used a Coreflame to give me sentience. *crackle* I have guarded the small flame all these years.

t_ch: 但…再坚硬的岩石也会风化，如你所见，现在只剩这么点了。
t_en: But even the hardest boulder will weather. As you can see, this is what little I have left.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 呼呼。火焰变幻不定，但大地始终如一。付出总有回报。
t_en: *crackle* The flame is ever-changing, but the land remains constant. Your work will be rewarded.

t_ch: 我感受到了力量，呼呼，你做得好啊。带着这缕灵火离开吧，它现在属于你了。
t_en: I can feel the power. *crackle* Well done. Take this sliver of spiritual flame with you. It is yours now.

t_ch: 这不是我需要的薪柴！呼呼，灵火蕴含万物，但想熔化这个还是太费劲了！
t_en: This is not the firewood I need! *crackle* The spiritual flame contains everything, but it will take too much effort to melt this.

t_ch: 呼呼。火焰变幻不定，但大地始终如一。付出总有回报。
t_en: *crackle* The flame is ever-changing, but the land remains constant. Your work will be rewarded.

t_ch: 呼呼。还能有什么是永恒的？
t_en: *crackle* What else is eternal?

t_ch: 呼呼。我不是害怕高的地方，只是这里风有点大，吹得我的有些头晕。
t_en: *crackle* I am not afraid of heights, but it is windy here, and I am a little dizzy.

t_ch: 你救了我，谢谢。但要是不忙的话，能否再给我点柴火？这地方很少会有人来，如果没被你发现，我可能就真要熄灭了。
t_en: Thank you for saving me. But if you're not too busy, can I have some more firewood? Not a lot of people come through here, and I might really have been extinguished if you didn't find me.

t_ch: 讲讲你的故事？
t_en: Tell me your story.

t_ch: 我就是颗滚动的小石子，被风吹到哪里，呼呼，我就呆在哪里。离开{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}神躯的时候，我还以为冒险总算要开始了。
t_en: I am a rolling stone, and I go where the wind takes me. *crackle* After leaving {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios'{RUBY_E#} divine body, I thought my adventure was finally going to start.

t_ch: 可你看，这屋顶哪有什么好玩的事，除了路过的虫，就只有天空的云了。
t_en: But there's nothing interesting up here, other than the occasional bug and the clouds in the sky.

t_ch: 我能有什么好处吗？
t_en: What do I get from this?

t_ch: 呼呼。你问了个好问题，我什么都没有，要是这火苗你不嫌弃的话，就拿走吧。
t_en: *crackle* A good question. I don't have anything, but if you don't mind this little flame, you may have it.

t_ch: 还不错，这种偏僻地方也没什么可挑剔的了。呼呼，这是说好的，送给你！
t_en: Not bad, I can't really complain about anything since I'm out here. *crackle* This is what we agreed on, take it!

t_ch: 太冷了…呼呼，请将那东西拿远点。呼…呼，我都快冻僵了……
t_en: It's cold... *crackle* Please take that away from me. Hu...ff... I'm freezing.

t_ch: 呼呼。我什么都没有，若是你能给我点柴火，那就拿走这所剩不多的火苗吧。
t_en: *crackle* I don't have anything. But if you can give me some firewood, then you can take what's left of the little flame.

t_ch: 呼呼。屋顶的风很大，我得保护好火苗才行。
t_en: *crackle* The wind up here is very strong, and I must protect the flame.

t_ch: 啊，又一个迷途的羔羊，不知你是否拥有我所期待的智慧——就让我来考考你。
t_en: Ah, another lost soul. I wonder if you possess the wisdom I'm seeking. Well, let me test you.

t_ch: 什么东西胸怀广阔，可以容纳世间一切污物；却又脆弱不堪，一根针刺便足以洞穿？
t_en: What is vast enough to contain all the world's filth, yet delicate enough to be pierced by a pinprick?

t_ch: 土地。
t_en: Land.

t_ch: 只对了前半句——正确答案是垃圾袋！
t_en: Well, this only matches the first half. The correct answer is: A trash bag!

t_ch: 气球。
t_en: A balloon.

t_ch: 只对了后半句——正确答案是垃圾袋！
t_en: Well, this only matches the second half. The correct answer is: A trash bag!

t_ch: 垃圾袋。
t_en: A trash bag.

t_ch: 不错！看来你确实有几分机灵——垃圾袋正是世间最为包容之物。
t_en: Not bad! It appears you do possess some wit. Of all things in the world, trash bags are the most vast and tolerant.

t_ch: 爱。
t_en: Love.

t_ch: 高尚的回答——但对垃圾桶而言，正确答案是垃圾袋！
t_en: A noble answer, but for a trashcan, the correct answer is a trash bag!

t_ch: 我的肚子。
t_en: My stomach.

t_ch: 呵呵…那就让我看看你的肚子有多抗踹吧！
t_en: Oh... let's see how well your stomach withstands kicks, then!

t_ch: 但智慧的考验可不会如此轻松——桶有五吨，问题有三个，现在你要回答第二个。
t_en: But the test of wisdom won't be so simple: There are three questions in total, and now it's time for the second one.

t_ch: 什么东西能隔绝污秽，镇压不祥气息；又坚固无比，足以承受最猛烈的风吹雨打？
t_en: What repels impurities, subdues filth, and is sturdy enough to endure the harshest winds and rain?

t_ch: 雨伞。
t_en: An umbrella.

t_ch: 最多算对了四分之一——正确答案是垃圾桶盖！
t_en: That's far from correct. The correct answer is a trashcan's lid!

t_ch: 垃圾桶盖。
t_en: A trashcan's lid.

t_ch: 不错！桶盖正是世间最为坚固超群的防御，正是它保卫着无数垃圾桶的尊严。
t_en: Correct! A trashcan lid indeed represents the most impenetrable defense, safeguarding the sanctity of trashcans.

t_ch: 墓碑。
t_en: A tombstone.

t_ch: 这么说实在太不尊重逝者了——正确答案是垃圾桶盖！
t_en: How disrespectful to the deceased. The correct answer is a trashcan's lid!

t_ch: 脸皮。
t_en: Cheeks.

t_ch: …对某些人来说，这个答案或许是正确的——这样的人，我必将铲除！
t_en: ...This answer might be correct for some individuals. But I intend to exterminate all those for whom this answer might apply.

t_ch: 我的球棒。
t_en: My baseball bat.

t_ch: 呵，你的球棒？那就让我看看它到底有多结实吧！
t_en: Your baseball bat, huh? Well, let's see how sturdy it is then!

t_ch: 接下来是最后一个问题：什么东西在这里令人生厌，却能在别处产生价值；有些人嫌弃万分，有些人爱不释手？
t_en: Now, for the final question: What is loathed by some but cherished by others? What is shunned by some and sought by others?

t_ch: 钱。
t_en: Money.

t_ch: 会讨厌钱的人，我平生从未见过——正确答案是垃圾！
t_en: Well, I've never encountered anyone who loathes money. The correct answer is: Trash!

t_ch: 游戏币。
t_en: Game tokens.

t_ch: 什么？难道这地方的娱乐设施还不够多吗——正确答案是垃圾！
t_en: What? Isn't there already enough entertainment around here? The correct answer is: Trash!

t_ch: 苏乐达。
t_en: SoulGlad.

t_ch: 什么？我的身体都快被苏乐达空瓶堆满了，你居然认为它不受欢迎？你有难了！
t_en: What? I've got all these empty Solitaire bottles here, and you think someone would loathe it? Go tell that to SoulGlad fans!

t_ch: 垃圾。
t_en: Trash.

t_ch: 没错！垃圾是放错了地方的资源。而对于垃圾桶来说，它总是可爱又迷人。
t_en: Exactly! Trash is a misplaced resource, and it is always endearing and charming in the eyes of trashcans.

t_ch: 我。
t_en: Me.

t_ch: 正确答案是垃圾！如果你是这样看待自己的，那就让我把你装进桶里吧！
t_en: The correct answer is: Trash! If that's how you see yourself, then let me place you inside me!

t_ch: 没想到啊，你居然回答出了全部的问题，真是令我刮目相看。
t_en: I'm impressed. I didn't expect you to answer all the questions.

t_ch: 不管以垃圾桶还是人类的角度，你都配得上智慧的奖励。我会为你让出前路……
t_en: Your intelligence deserves recognition, be it from the perspective of a trashcan or a human. I shall make way for you...

t_ch: …必须承认，战斗的技巧也是一种智慧。你用智慧征服了我，而我将会离去……
t_en: I must acknowledge that combat prowess is also a form of wisdom. You have bested me with your great wisdom, and I shall depart...

t_ch: 唉，我知道我是世上最无能的桶…但就不能让我一个桶待会儿吗？
t_en: *sigh* I know I'm the worst trashcan in the world... but can't you just leave me alone for a while?

t_ch: 还是说，你也认为我是一个废桶，特意赶来嘲笑我的？
t_en: Or, are you here solely to mock me, a basket case?

t_ch: 你是一个废桶。
t_en: You are a basket case.

t_ch: 是啊，我承认…但你为什么要把它说出来呢？你难道不知道事实会撕裂我的伤口吗？
t_en: I admit it... but why do you have to point it out? Don't you know that the truth would tear me apart?

t_ch: 哦，我懂了，你是特意来消遣我的！
t_en: Oh, I see. You are here just to mock me!

t_ch: 你不是一个废桶。
t_en: You are not a basket case.

t_ch: 是嘛…既然你认为我不是个废桶，那就说明我肯定存在有价值的地方。
t_en: Well... if this is the case, then I must possess value in some way.

t_ch: 可像我这样又不好看，又不中用的东西，究竟什么地方会有价值呢？
t_en: But what value does something as useless as me possess?

t_ch: 你长得很好看啊。
t_en: You look appealing.

t_ch: 不，我对自己的外形心里有数。你这是无脑的吹捧，是恶意讽刺！果然你也是来嘲笑我的！
t_en: No, I know well about my appearance. Your boasts are dripping with malice and sarcasm! I knew you are here to mock me!

t_ch: 你很能装垃圾啊。
t_en: You can contain a lot of trash.

t_ch: 不，我对自己的能耐心里有数。你这是无脑的吹捧，是恶意讽刺！果然你也是来嘲笑我的！
t_en: No, I know well about my capacity. Your boasts are dripping with malice and sarcasm! I knew you are here to mock me!

t_ch: 你是个大垃圾啊。
t_en: You are but a piece of trash.

t_ch: 是哦，对垃圾桶来说，垃圾就是最有价值的东西。
t_en: Oh, indeed. To a trashcan, trash is the most valuable thing.

t_ch: 如果我是废桶，是垃圾，那我不就成了最有价值的东西了吗？哈哈哈哈！
t_en: If I'm a piece of trash, wouldn't that make me the most valuable thing? Hahaha!

t_ch: 谢谢你，陌生的桶，你让我感觉好多了。
t_en: Thank you, strange trashcan. I'm feeling much better now.

t_ch: 可…如果我好起来了，那不就意味着我不再是废桶、不再是垃圾了吗？我作为垃圾的价值，也会跟着一起消失……
t_en: However... if I'm feeling better, wouldn't that mean I'm no longer a basket case? My value as trash would vanish...

t_ch: 当你打开了一扇门…
t_en: When you open a door...

t_ch: 你也就获得了一座桥~
t_en: You'll also gain a bridge~

t_ch: 童话书里的常客…
t_en: A frequent guest in fairy tales...

t_ch: 除了花朵，还有蘑菇~
t_en: Aside from flowers, there are mushrooms too~

t_ch: 养猫还是养狗？
t_en: Should I raise a cat or a dog?

t_ch: 我更想种一棵香蕉树...
t_en: I'd rather plant a banana tree...

t_ch: 如果可以这样偷吃月饼…
t_en: If only I could sneak mooncakes like this...

t_ch: 那就不会有人能发现了吧…
t_en: Nobody will find out...

t_ch: 当你填满一颗心的时候…
t_en: When you fill a heart to its brim...

t_ch: 总有另一颗心会空出来。
t_en: Another heart will be emptied.

t_ch: 生活在铅字的海洋里…
t_en: Life floats on an ocean of written words...

t_ch: 难免会怀念森林中的生活。
t_en: You can't help but miss the life in a forest.

t_ch: 收帆凝望…
t_en: Furl the sails to gaze out...

t_ch: 是为了更好地扬帆起航。
t_en: All to set off even better ahead.

t_ch: 键盘还是手柄？
t_en: A keyboard or controller?

t_ch: 中央处理器并不介意。
t_en: The CPU doesn't mind either.

t_ch: 世界是一个个鸟窝…
t_en: The world is made of many bird's nests...

t_ch: 人与人的悲喜并不相通。
t_en: Humans do not share the same joys and sorrows.

t_ch: 转过城市的街角…
t_en: Turn at the corner of a street in the city...

t_ch: 寻找烟火气中的温暖。
t_en: And seek warmth within the hustle and bustle.

t_ch: 喜悦和忧伤…
t_en: Joy and sorrow...

t_ch: 哪一个更加高贵？
t_en: Which is more noble?

t_ch: 如果不喜欢城市的喧嚣…
t_en: If you dislike the clamor of the city...

t_ch: 请转身寻找自己的静音键。
t_en: Turn around and find your own mute button.

t_ch: 绝壁存在的意义…
t_en: Mountains exist...

t_ch: 便是留给勇者攀登~
t_en: For the brave to scale~

t_ch: 生命没有空白…
t_en: There are no blanks in life...

t_ch: 它只会变幻律动的空间…
t_en: They will only transform into a rhythmic space...

t_ch: 6加6等于<unbreak>66</unbreak>，8加8等于<unbreak>88</unbreak>…我终于悟透了！
t_en: 6 plus 6 equals <unbreak>66</unbreak>. 8 plus 8 equals <unbreak>88</unbreak>... I finally understand it!

t_ch: …喂，那边那个，我问你：7加7等于几？
t_en: ...Hey, you, over there. Let me ask you a question: What does 7 plus 7 equal?

t_ch: 等于7。
t_en: It equals 7.

t_ch: 你是白痴吗？把两个7加在一起，那就是<unbreak>77</unbreak>啊！
t_en: Wait, are you an idiot? Obviously, it's <unbreak>77</unbreak>!

t_ch: 等于<unbreak>14</unbreak>。
t_en: It equals <unbreak>14</unbreak>.

t_ch: 你是白痴吗？把两个7加在一起，那就是<unbreak>77</unbreak>啊！
t_en: Wait, are you an idiot? Obviously, it's <unbreak>77</unbreak>!

t_ch: 等于<unbreak>77</unbreak>。
t_en: It equals <unbreak>77</unbreak>.

t_ch: 不错，你已经掌握了我最新发明的垃圾桶定理——看来这定理还是挺简洁的。
t_en: Not bad, you've mastered my latest discovery, the "Trashcan Theorem"! Well, this name sounds quite concise.

t_ch: 反正不等于<unbreak>14</unbreak>。
t_en: Anyway, it's definitely not <unbreak>14</unbreak>.

t_ch: 倒是没错，但下次要是还这么回答，我就要让你好看。
t_en: That's not wrong, but don't answer like that again, or there will be consequences.

t_ch: 不过只回答一个问题还算不了什么。就让我再考考你，1加1等于几？
t_en: Answering just one question doesn't prove anything. Let me ask you another question: What does 1 plus 1 equal?

t_ch: 等于2。
t_en: It equals 2.

t_ch: 漂亮！看来你还精通基础数学，我的垃圾桶定理后继有人了！
t_en: Well done! You're skilled at basic math too, it seems! Now, I have a successor to my Trashcan Theorem!

t_ch: 等于<unbreak>11</unbreak>。
t_en: It equals <unbreak>11</unbreak>.

t_ch: 你是白痴吗？学过数学的人都知道，1加1当然等于2啊！
t_en: Are you an idiot? Everyone knows that 1 plus 1 equals 2!

t_ch: 反正不等于2。
t_en: Anyway, it's definitely not 2.

t_ch: 怎么可能？学过数学的人都知道，1加1当然等于2啊！
t_en: What are you even talking about? Everyone knows that 1 plus 1 equals 2!

t_ch: 你要记住，这份定理蕴含着宇宙的奥秘，千万不可随意向他人说起，否则甚至会迎来星神的注意。
t_en: Remember, this theorem encompasses the mysteries of the universe. Don't mention it to anyone, or you might attract the attention of the Aeons.

t_ch: 我要去别处继续钻研了，你也要记得保持思考。
t_en: I'll continue my research elsewhere. As for you, don't forget to keep thinking.

t_ch: 你这厮，竟敢消遣洒家，看打！
t_en: You dare mock me? I'll teach you a lesson you won't forget!

t_ch: 垃圾桶理应智慧…
t_en: Wisdom befits trashcans...

t_ch: 而我将给予试炼。
t_en: And I shall grant trials.

t_ch: 我就是个废桶…
t_en: I'm just a basket case...

t_ch: 什么价值也没有…
t_en: I'm totally worthless...

t_ch: 真是绝妙的发现！
t_en: What a marvelous discovery!

t_ch: 足以撼动整个学科！
t_en: This will shake the entire field!

t_ch: 臣民们都去哪了…
t_en: Where have my subjects gone...

t_ch: 真是礼崩乐坏。
t_en: What a pathetic neglect of responsibility.

t_ch: 桶生没有意义…
t_en: A trashcan's life is meaningless...

t_ch: 一切尽是虚无…
t_en: Everything is but void...

t_ch: 钱是万物之源…
t_en: Money makes the world go round...

t_ch: 没钱万万不能…
t_en: You can't do anything without money...

t_ch: 没人比我更懂美梦…
t_en: No one understands dreams better than me...

t_ch: 梦境不容亵渎！
t_en: Dreamscapes are not to be desecrated!

t_ch: 天凉了，该让家族破产了。
t_en: It's getting chilly. Time to bankrupt The Family.

t_ch: 这个垃圾桶双手抱臂，桶盖翘得比其他桶都高上几分。虽然垃圾桶并没有能被称为眼睛的器官，但你似乎察觉到了他不屑的目光。
t_en: This trashcan has its arms crossed, with its lid slightly lifted compared to other trashcans. Even though it lacks any eye-like features, you can almost feel its disdainful gaze.

t_ch: 现在的垃圾袋，真是一个比一个干瘪了。作为本王的贡品，这怎么够格呢？
t_en: Trash bags these days are seriously too deflated. How can they serve as a proper tribute to their king?

t_ch: 你是垃圾桶的王？
t_en: Are you the King of Trashcans?

t_ch: 不错，本王就是垃圾桶王国的新任主宰，汤姆•杰克•苏大帝二世。整个垃圾桶王国都以服务我为荣。
t_en: Yep, I am the one and only King of the Trashcan Kingdom, Tom Jack Soo the Great II. The entire Kingdom takes great pride in serving me.

t_ch: 我不是垃圾袋。
t_en: I'm not a trash bag.

t_ch: 怎么，你是在怀疑本王的判断？看来必须好好教导你一些皇室礼仪了。
t_en: What? Are you questioning the King's judgment? Looks like someone needs a lesson in royal etiquette.

t_ch: 看你一眼就能识得本王的尊驾，估计也是个心思灵敏之人，本王就给你一个机会吧。
t_en: Considering you can appreciate your King's greatness, it seems you've got some sharp wit.

t_ch: 本王乃是垃圾桶中最为殊贵的身躯。可惜梦境的规则不同于现实，本王只得随手捏造了一个新身躯。
t_en: I may be the king of all trashcans, but unfortunately, the rules of the Dreamscape differ from those of reality, so I had to come up with this makeshift new body.

t_ch: 依你看，本王的这副身躯成色如何？
t_en: What do you think of my body?

t_ch: 看起来真是高大又威猛。
t_en: You look majestic and formidable.

t_ch: 不错，你能识得泰山、明辨美丑，言语也让本王甚是喜欢。
t_en: Not bad at all. You can distinguish the outstanding from the mediocre, and your words are pleasing to my royal ears.

t_ch: 倘若在现实，本王一定会封你为「垃圾桶大将军」。
t_en: If this were the real world, I'd gladly award you the title of "Trashcan General."

t_ch: 看起来就像个普通垃圾桶。
t_en: You are just an ordinary trashcan.

t_ch: 你、你真是，朽木不可雕也，面对垃圾桶王都不懂得美言几句。
t_en: H—How ignorant of you! I can't believe you can't even talk properly in front of the king of all trashcans.

t_ch: 像你这样的家伙，早晚有天会因言获罪，那不如本王亲自来了结你算了！
t_en: Someone as arrogant as you will definitely face the consequences for their disrespectful words. Maybe I should just take care of you myself!

t_ch: 有够丑的。
t_en: You look ugly.

t_ch: 你、你竟敢顶撞王驾，口出狂言？哪怕身边没有护卫，本王也能亲自教训你！
t_en: H—How dare you! How dare you offend your king!? Even in the absence of my guards, I'll teach you a lesson myself!

t_ch: 拿好吧，这是本王赐予你的奖励。
t_en: Here, take this. A reward bestowed upon you by your king.

t_ch: 桶是一块会思考的金属。而我时刻在想，桶生的意义是什么？
t_en: A trashcan is a piece of metal capable of thinking. And I'm always pondering, what purpose does a trashcan serve?

t_ch: 装更多垃圾。
t_en: To hold more trash.

t_ch: 多么庸俗、功利！倘若一个桶唯一的追求就是装更多垃圾，那么他的桶生想必也是浅薄又无趣的。
t_en: How mundane! If a trashcan's sole pursuit is to contain more trash, its existence must be superficial and uninteresting.

t_ch: 变成金垃圾桶。
t_en: To become a gold trashcan.

t_ch: 多么庸俗、功利！倘若一个桶唯一的追求就是美貌与华服，那么他的桶生想必也是浅薄又无趣的。
t_en: How mundane! If a trashcan's sole pursuit is a fancy exterior, its existence must be superficial and uninteresting.

t_ch: 桶生没有意义。
t_en: A trashcan's life is meaningless.

t_ch: 是啊，垃圾桶的一生怎么会有意义呢…我们总是充满喧哗与骚动，却不知一切只是一场幻梦……
t_en: Indeed, how could a trashcan's life be meaningful...? Everything is but a fleeting dream of insignificance...

t_ch: 看来，这是一个深陷虚无的桶。万事万物在它看来都是垃圾，而垃圾对它来说更是不足挂齿。它已经超然于常桶。
t_en: This trashcan appears to have transcended the ordinary, with a deep sense of detachment from the world of garbage.

t_ch: 然而，这世间依旧有许多纷扰的疑问在纠缠着桶们。我离开学院前，桶之智者曾说：扭盖还是不扭，这是一个问题。
t_en: However, many doubts are still troubling us trashcans in this realm. Before I left my academy, the Wise trashcan once posed the question, "To twist the lid or not, that is the question."

t_ch: 倘若由你来回答，你会在走路时扭动自己的桶盖吗？
t_en: If it were you, would you twist your lid while walking?

t_ch: 扭。
t_en: I would.

t_ch: 不扭。
t_en: I wouldn't.

t_ch: 这没有意义。
t_en: This is meaningless.

t_ch: 是啊，即便如此精妙的问题，也不能突破意义的桎梏……
t_en: Yeah, even such a subtle question is restrained by the nature of existence...

t_ch: 垃圾学院的钻研已经走到了尽头，所有的桶都将面临意义的叩问。
t_en: The Academy's studies have reached its plateau. All trashcans will face the challenge of finding meaning.

t_ch: 而欣然接受这一切——我的桶生已经圆满。如今我将彻底堕入那片领域，再无所求……
t_en: As for me, I will accept it... My life has achieved its peak, and now I will embrace a realm where desires no longer hold sway...

t_ch: 苜蓿钞！没有人不爱苜蓿钞！我要，我要它！
t_en: Alfalfa Credits! No one could resist Alfalfa Credits! I want them! I want them!

t_ch: 可是究竟该怎么才能赚到钞票？快把答案告诉我！
t_en: What should I do to get rich? Please give me the answer!

t_ch: 努力工作，勤劳致富。
t_en: Stay dedicated to your job and work hard.

t_ch: 工作？天啊，你一定是想让我死！
t_en: Work hard? Oh, heavens! Do you want me dead?

t_ch: 发明创造，收专利费。
t_en: Invent, create, and earn royalties and patents.

t_ch: 创造？天啊，难道你不知道我很愚钝吗？我懂了，你在嘲笑我！
t_en: Invent things? Oh, heavens. Don't you know I'm way too dumb for that? I get it, you're mocking me!

t_ch: 等待天上掉馅饼。
t_en: Wait for a windfall.

t_ch: 嗯…这听起来倒是很简单，而且不费力气。我喜欢。
t_en: Hmm... That sounds simple enough and doesn't require any effort. I like it.

t_ch: 看来，眼前的这个桶既不聪明也不勤劳，在垃圾桶中也堪称极品了。
t_en: Looks like this trashcan is neither smart nor diligent — a rare quality among trashcans.

t_ch: 话又说回来了，做什么事最容易吃到天上掉的馅饼呢？
t_en: Well, what's the easiest way to get a windfall?

t_ch: 巴结有钱人。
t_en: Butter up the rich.

t_ch: 天啊，你居然让我讨好别人？你简直是在侮辱我！
t_en: Are you telling me to kiss someone else's derrière? Humiliating!

t_ch: 多翻垃圾桶。
t_en: Rummage through other trashcans.

t_ch: 我自己就已经是垃圾桶了，你还让我去翻别的垃圾桶——你想累死我！？
t_en: How can you tell me to do that when I'm a trashcan myself? Do you want to see me die of exhaustion!?

t_ch: 什么也不做。
t_en: Do nothing.

t_ch: 什么也不做…那不就是我现在的状态吗？太好了！
t_en: Do nothing... Isn't it what I've been doing? Wonderful!

t_ch: 这么看来，我已经走在了发财的路上——我要回去继续无所事事了。
t_en: Seems like I'm already on the right path to wealth... I'm getting back to my idle life.

t_ch: 瞧瞧这群筑梦师吧，这群人压根不懂得梦境的真谛。他们制造出来的东西怎么能称为美梦呢？
t_en: Look at these Dreamweavers. They have not a single clue about what the Dreamscape is really about. How can they call their creation a beautiful dream?

t_ch: 就比如这楼顶，太空旷了…喂，你觉得楼顶应该加点什么？
t_en: For instance, this rooftop is too empty... Hey, what do you think we should put here?

t_ch: 花坛。
t_en: Flowerbeds.

t_ch: 啧，没品味的东西……
t_en: Tsk, talk about bad taste...

t_ch: 更多垃圾桶。
t_en: More trashcans.

t_ch: 有品位。我感觉我们有不少共同话题。
t_en: Tasteful. I think we have a lot in common.

t_ch: 通风口。
t_en: Vents.

t_ch: 啧，没品味的东西……
t_en: Tsk, talk about bad taste...

t_ch: 望远镜。
t_en: A telescope.

t_ch: 啧，没品味的东西……
t_en: Tsk, talk about bad taste...

t_ch: 再看看这里的天空，空旷得要死，一点设计都没有。你有什么好的建议吗？
t_en: Look at the sky here. It's so plain and has nothing on it. Do you have any suggestions?

t_ch: 加点白云和飞鸟。
t_en: Some clouds and birds in flight.

t_ch: 谁会喜欢那个啊？我真是看走眼了才会觉得你懂梦境！
t_en: Who would find that appealing? I was so wrong to think that you would understand the true meaning of the Dreamscape!

t_ch: 改成冰天雪地。
t_en: Make it snow.

t_ch: 对，我也认为那是好的…但究竟为什么呢？是什么让我产生了这种想法？
t_en: I agree that's quite a brilliant idea... But why? What gave you the idea?

t_ch: 放几颗卫星上去。
t_en: Send a couple of satellites up there.

t_ch: 谁会喜欢那个啊？我真是看走眼了才会觉得你懂梦境！
t_en: Who would find that appealing? I was so wrong to think that you would understand the true meaning of the Dreamscape!

t_ch: 改成一片火红。
t_en: Paint the town fiery red.

t_ch: 谁会喜欢那个啊？我真是看走眼了才会觉得你懂梦境！
t_en: Who would find that appealing? I was so wrong to think that you would understand the true meaning of the Dreamscape!

t_ch: 总之，你的建议令我不能更加赞同，他们真该聘用你去设计梦境！
t_en: I couldn't agree more with your suggestions. They should have engaged you to design the Dreamscape!

t_ch: 哦，又一个试图学习哈努精神的新人。让我来考考你，哈努兄弟面对敌人围攻时会怎么做？
t_en: Oh, here's another newbie ready to learn some Hanu's spirit. Let's find out how much you've learned. What would Hanu do if he was besieged by enemies?

t_ch: 逃走。
t_en: He would run away.

t_ch: 什么？伟大的哈努兄弟从不背对敌人。你、你竟敢侮辱他！
t_en: What? The great Hanu would never show his back to his enemies. H—How dare you insult him!

t_ch: 感化敌人。
t_en: He would convince the enemies to mend their ways.

t_ch: 什么？伟大的哈努兄弟从不对邪恶心慈手软。你、你竟敢玷污他！
t_en: What? The great Hanu would never show mercy to evil. H—How dare you throw dirt on him!

t_ch: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

t_ch: 没错，这确实是哈努兄弟会做的事情！在打倒敌人之前先发出一声很酷的*哼*。看来你很上道啊。
t_en: You're right! That's on brand with Brother Hanu! They would always make a cool *hmph* sound before taking down enemies. Seems like you know your thing!

t_ch: 掏出火箭筒。
t_en: He would take out his rocket propeller.

t_ch: 那是之后要做的事情。在此之前，哈努兄弟必须完成一个至关重要的动作……
t_en: Not so soon. Before that, there's a crucial move that Hanu must make...

t_ch: 那么，想象刚才发生的一切都是一场电影。现在麻烦解决，所有坏人都被打倒在地，影片也进入了最高潮——此时此刻，哈努兄弟会做些什么？
t_en: Now, imagine everything that has taken place being part of a movie. Now that the trouble has been sorted out and all the bad guys have been wiped out, the plot is reaching its climax. What do you think Hanu would do at this point?

t_ch: 射一发火箭，不回头看爆炸。
t_en: Fire his rocket and blow everything up as he walked away.

t_ch: 什么？哈努兄弟才不会做毁坏公物的事情。你、你竟敢玷污他！
t_en: What? Hanu would never damage public property! H—How dare you tarnish his name!

t_ch: 与美丽的玻璃瓶开展浪漫关系。
t_en: He would start a romantic relationship with the beautiful glass bottle.

t_ch: 什么？哈努兄弟才不会做这种多余的事情。你、你竟敢玷污他！
t_en: What? Hanu would never do something so unnecessary. H—How dare you smear his reputation!

t_ch: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

t_ch: 哦，胜利的宣言，多么美妙！我现在开始相信你也是哈努兄弟的忠实粉丝了。
t_en: Oh, what a wonderful declaration of victory! I'm starting to be convinced that you're a true Hanu fan.

t_ch: 如此看来，这片乐园里还是有懂行之人的。我很欣慰。
t_en: It's so nice to know that there are still folks who know their stuff in this theme park.

t_ch: 哈努兄弟是最棒的…
t_en: Hanu is the best...

t_ch: 我要变得像他一样强！
t_en: I want to become as strong as him!

t_ch: 现在的家族小年轻，真是越来越不懂礼貌了…喂，那边的实习侍者，为客人指路时该怎么做才最妥当？
t_en: Young members of The Family these days don't seem to know a thing about manners... Hey, that trainee server over there, what's the appropriate thing to do when you're giving directions to a guest?

t_ch: 用手直接指向目标地点。
t_en: Point directly in the direction of the destination with my hand.

t_ch: 太不礼貌了！正确的做法是四指并拢、掌心向上…你，不合格！
t_en: That's rude! The correct way is to bring your four fingers together with your palm facing upward... That's a fail!

t_ch: 手指并拢，用手掌尖指示方向。
t_en: I'll keep my fingers together and point in the right direction with the tip of my palm.

t_ch: 不错，四指并拢、掌心向上，这才是引导客人的正确姿势。看来你还算上过几堂礼仪课。
t_en: Not bad. Keeping the fingers together with your palm facing upward is the proper gesture when giving directions. Looks like you've had a few lessons in etiquette.

t_ch: 我不是侍者…
t_en: I'm not a server...

t_ch: 什么，难道现在的公馆侍者连自知之明都没有了吗？干脆让我来清理门户吧！
t_en: What? Don't the servers nowadays even know their roles here? Maybe it's time to fire some of them!

t_ch: 直接拉着他去。
t_en: Bring the guest to the destination.

t_ch: 太不礼貌了！正确的做法是四指并拢、掌心向上…你，不合格！
t_en: That's rude! The correct way is to bring your four fingers together with your palm facing upward... That's a fail!

t_ch: 那么现在，家族的贵宾开始为每个人敬酒，你也顺带着被敬到了一杯。这个时候你该怎么回应？
t_en: Now, imagine the VIP of The Family raising a toast to everyone, including you. How would you respond?

t_ch: 我直接跳上桌子吃吃吃。
t_en: I'll join the table and start feasting on the delicacies.

t_ch: 你…真是朽木不可雕也。家族的脸面都被你给丢尽了！
t_en: You... are hopeless. You'd be such a disgrace to The Family!

t_ch: 杯口放低与他碰杯。
t_en: I'd lower my glass when clinking it with theirs.

t_ch: 哎，这就对了。对待贵宾，就该把身份放低一点才好办事。孺子可教啊。
t_en: Yeah, that's right. You need to be humble when dealing with the VIP. I think you have a bright future ahead.

t_ch: 赶紧跑开。
t_en: I'd take off immediately.

t_ch: 怎么能不给贵宾面子呢？家族的脸都被你给丢尽了！
t_en: How could you ignore the gesture of the VIP? You'd be such a disgrace to The Family!

t_ch: 要是其他年轻人也像你这么懂规矩，该有多好啊……
t_en: If only all other youngsters were as well-mannered as you...

t_ch: 礼仪日渐凋敝…
t_en: Nobody cares about etiquette anymore...

t_ch: 规矩必须传承…
t_en: But it's important that we pass on the traditions to future generations...

t_ch: 嘘，小点声，这可是单大买卖，别被哈努兄弟和钟表小子他们发现了。
t_en: Shh, keep it down. This deal is huge. Keep it from Hanu and Clockie.

t_ch: 走私这批苏乐达花了我好大力气。你要不是接头人的话，就别打扰我做买卖。
t_en: It took me a lot of effort to smuggle this batch of SoulGlad here. If you aren't my contact, please leave.

t_ch: 我就是接头人。
t_en: I'm your contact.

t_ch: 太好了…虽然你长得和我想象中不太一样。
t_en: That's great... though you look different from what I imagined.

t_ch: 我是钟表小子派来的卧底。
t_en: Clockie sent me here as an undercover agent.

t_ch: 什、什么？可恶……
t_en: Wh—What? Dagnabbit...

t_ch: 分我一瓶尝尝。
t_en: Let me have a bottle.

t_ch: 你谁啊？付钱了吗你？别打扰我交接货物！
t_en: Who do you think you are? Have you paid? Don't disturb me when I'm trying to hand over my goods!

t_ch: 这批苏乐达钱已经付过了，你直接把货拿走就行。不过以防万一我还是先问一句，接头暗号是什么？
t_en: The goods have been paid, so you can just take them. Just to be safe, please tell me the passphrase for this transaction.

t_ch: 塔塔洛夫万岁！
t_en: Long live, Tatalov!

t_ch: 塔塔洛夫？你还有脸提那个暴君！看打！
t_en: Tatalov? How dare you bring up that diabolical tyrant! Take my punch!

t_ch: 为了苏乐达！
t_en: SoulGlad above all!

t_ch: 不错，为了苏乐达！这正是我们永不磨灭的座右铭。
t_en: That's right! SoulGlad above all! That will forever be our motto.

t_ch: 吾乃「奇兵」！
t_en: I'm the hero!

t_ch: 这根本不是暗号！好哇，没想到你居然伪造身份欺骗我的感情！
t_en: That's not the passphrase at all! How dare you fake your identity and take me for a ride!

t_ch: 我是变量！
t_en: I'm a variable!

t_ch: 这根本不是暗号！好哇，没想到你居然伪造身份欺骗我的感情！
t_en: That's not the passphrase at all! How dare you fake your identity and take me for a ride!

t_ch: 这批货你拿走吧，希望之后我们也能合作愉快。
t_en: The goods are yours. Fancy doing business with you.

t_ch: 嘘，别被它们发现了。
t_en: Shh, we have to keep this a secret from them.

t_ch: 这可是一单大买卖。
t_en: This is a huge deal.

t_ch: 跟这群虫豸在一起，怎么能治理好美梦呢？事到如今，只能由我代替家族做出惩戒了……
t_en: How am I supposed to govern the Dreamscape well when I'm surrounded by idiots? Now, I must take it upon myself to punish the bad guys on behalf of The Family...

t_ch: 这位陌生人啊，设身处地的想一想吧。倘若你在大街上见到有人故意破坏公物，你要怎么做？
t_en: Stranger, please think in my shoes. What would you do if you caught someone damaging public property on the streets?

t_ch: 用道理劝说他。
t_en: Talk some sense into the person.

t_ch: 不。正确答案是揍他！将他殴打至不敢再犯为止！
t_en: Nope. You should beat the person up until they promise to never repeat the mistake!

t_ch: 用球棒教训他一顿。
t_en: Teach the person a lesson with my baseball bat.

t_ch: 好，我就喜欢你这股嫉恶如仇的直率性子！
t_en: Bravo! I like your odium for wrongdoings!

t_ch: 把公物修好。
t_en: Fix the damaged property.

t_ch: …你倒挺心善，但那是破坏者才应接受的惩罚——你这是在帮他脱罪！
t_en: ...You're very kind-hearted, but that's the punishment for the perpetrator. By doing that, you'd be helping the culprit to run scot-free!

t_ch: 所以说，一定要让那些犯下过错的人接受惩罚，而不只是轻飘飘地对他们说教。看来你也同意这点。
t_en: All in all, it's imperative to make sure those who have committed wrongdoings are punished, instead of just giving them verbal warnings. Looks like you're with me on this point.

t_ch: 那么，如果某个逐梦客因无心之举搞砸了谐乐大典，你又会怎么做呢？
t_en: If a Dreamchaser messed up the Charmony Festival due to an unintentional mistake, what would you do?

t_ch: 将他逐出梦境。
t_en: Oust the Dreamchaser from the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 哈，现在家族最严酷的惩罚也就这招了——不痛不痒！
t_en: Ha, that's about the harshest punishment one can get from The Family, but it doesn't have much deterrent effect.

t_ch: 想真正让人长教训，必须得这样！
t_en: To ensure the perpetrator really learns their lesson, there's only one way to do it.

t_ch: 将他殴打至不敢再犯为止！
t_en: We need to beat him up until he promises to never repeat the mistake!

t_ch: 没错，哪怕是无心之举也必须接受惩罚，不然谁还会把这里当回事？
t_en: That's right. One must be punished even if the mistake is unintentional. Otherwise, no one's going to take this place seriously.

t_ch: 你已经完全掌握了痛击邪恶的诀窍。长久以来，家族的手段都太小儿科了！
t_en: Now, I believe you've mastered the way of striking down evil. The Family's been too lenient for way too long.

t_ch: 协助修复谐乐大典。
t_en: I'd assist in fixing the mistake and make sure the Charmony Festival can run smoothly again.

t_ch: 又是修复、修复，现在的家族碰上坏人难道只会忍让吗？
t_en: Fix, fix, fix... Does The Family just put up with bad guys when they run into them?

t_ch: 想真正让人长教训，必须得这样！
t_en: To ensure the perpetrator really learns their lesson, there's only one way to do it.

t_ch: 只有汗水与泪水才能给人刻骨铭心的教训——匹诺康尼还有你这样的人物存在，我很欣慰。
t_en: People only remember something when it makes them sweat and cry. I'm glad there's someone like you in Penacony.

t_ch: 惩戒顽徒！
t_en: Punish the rogue!

t_ch: 拨乱反正！
t_en: Make things right!

t_ch: 弟弟，没想到这海选居然如此困难……
t_en: Brother, I didn't think this preliminary round would be such a firefight...

t_ch: 是啊，哥哥，竟能困难如此。可恶的家族……
t_en: Yeah, it's that hard. Curse The Family...

t_ch: 发生甚么事了？
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 不好，哥哥，我们要被灭口了！
t_en: Oh no, brother, we're about to be eliminated!

t_ch: 别怕，弟弟，让{M#他}{F#她}见识我们热血沸腾的组合技！
t_en: Never fear, let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

t_ch: 你们为什么有俩？
t_en: Why are there two of you?

t_ch: 不好，哥哥，我们要被灭口了！
t_en: Oh no, brother, we're about to be eliminated!

t_ch: 别怕，弟弟，让{M#他}{F#她}见识我们热血沸腾的组合技！
t_en: Never fear, let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

t_ch: 对，可恶的家族！
t_en: Yeah, curse The Family!

t_ch: 哥哥，我们是不是要被灭口了？
t_en: Brother, are we going to be eliminated?

t_ch: 不用怕，弟弟。既然{M#他}{F#她}也痛斥了家族，就说明我们是一条船上的。
t_en: Don't worry. Since {M#he}{F#she} also rebuked The Family, it means we're on the same boat.

t_ch: 你来得正好。我们兄弟俩原本准备了个大杀器，打算在庆典中夺冠…没想到这地方强者如云，我们只能放弃。
t_en: You've come just in time. We initially prepared a major killer move to get the trophy for the festival... but who knew there were so many stronger contenders, so we had no choice but to give up.

t_ch: 现在我们准备离开，动身之前必须先把它给处理掉。你愿意接手吗？只要一千信用点。
t_en: We're preparing to leave now, and we have to get rid of it before we go. Are you willing to take over? It just costs a thousand credits.

t_ch: 哥哥，我预判他肯定会问为什么只卖一千信用点，快解释！
t_en: I reckon they're going to ask why we're only selling it for a thousand credits. Tell'em now!

t_ch: 呵，相传在宇宙混沌未开之际…中间忘了…后面也忘了。总之，这是一柄强大战争兵器的残片！
t_en: Heh, legend has it that in the primordial chaos of the universe... I forgot the middle part... I also forgot what happened after. Anyway, this is a remnant of a mighty War Gear!

t_ch: 我们之所以把它一千信用点卖给你，是因为你拿着球棒、面露杀气，看着像个「毁灭」派系大神——宝刀配英雄，你一定能妥善利用它。
t_en: The reason we're willing to sell it to you for so little is because you're holding a bat, and that murderous expression on your face makes you look like some harbinger of Destruction. A hero needs a favored weapon, and you will surely use it well.

t_ch: （交钱拿货）。
t_en: (Give over the money and take the goods).

t_ch: 爽快！拿上这个之后，你肯定能比「泯灭帮」走得更远！
t_en: Speedy! You'll definitely be stronger than the Annihilation Gang with this!

t_ch: 我们兄弟俩也是时候远走高飞了。就此别过吧！
t_en: It's time for us siblings to leave this place as well. I bid you farewell!

t_ch: 花钱还是免了…
t_en: Spending money is out of the question...

t_ch: …哥哥，这家伙怕不是要杀人夺宝！
t_en: ...Brother, I think this person's going to kill us and claim the goods!

t_ch: 别怕，弟弟，就让{M#他}{F#她}见识下我们热血沸腾的组合技！
t_en: Fear not. Let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

t_ch: 你这肯定是假的！
t_en: This is definitely fake!

t_ch: 什么？你不要也就算了，居然还敢侮辱我们的眼光！
t_en: What? I would've let it slide if you didn't want it, but you dare sully our eye for quality goods!

t_ch: 哥哥，让{M#他}{F#她}见识下我们热血沸腾的组合技！
t_en: Brother, let {M#him}{F#her} witness the intensity of our combined skill!

t_ch: 好厉害的守擂者…
t_en: What a monstrous defending champion...

t_ch: 只能游回家了…
t_en: I guess I'll just have to swim home...

t_ch: 踏入此地的人啊，舍弃一切希望吧！
t_en: Ye who stepped in here, abandon all hope!

t_ch: 夜已经深了，空无一物的车站也将被神秘笼罩——听，是什么东西在角落里躁动？
t_en: In the dead of the night, the empty train station is also shrouded in mystery... Wait, you hear something rustling in the corner?

t_ch: 一阵窸窸窣窣的声音从黑暗中传来，可能是某种鬼怪在潜伏…也可能是风吹动了垃圾袋。
t_en: A scuffling sound travels through the darkness — could be lurking monsters... or maybe just the wind blowing at trashbags.

t_ch: 只是风声而已。
t_en: It's just the wind.

t_ch: 风声？不，无知的受害者，深层梦境的危险远比你想象中恐怖…现在你就要见识到了！
t_en: Wind? Nay, naive victim, the dangers of the Deep Dreamscape are horrifying beyond your imagination... and you're about to witness them now!

t_ch: 不会是鬼吧…
t_en: It's not a ghost, is it...

t_ch: 不，深层梦境的危险远比你想象中恐怖……
t_en: No, the dangers of the Deep Dreamscape are horrifying beyond your imagination...

t_ch: 你怎么神神叨叨的？
t_en: What're you murmuring about?

t_ch: …因为这里已经被噩运笼罩了！所有人都会死，你也一样！
t_en: ...Because this place has been shrouded in doom! Everyone will die, and so will you!

t_ch: 你已进入了不可名状的恐怖之地，这伟大站台所潜藏的危险足以将常人杀死十次！
t_en: You've entered an arena of terror beyond description. The dangers that this great station harbors are enough to kill ordinary people ten times over!

t_ch: …可怜的家伙，你已被命运的大手攥握，注定要面临无妄之灾——不是每个闯入禁地的人都能活着离开。
t_en: ...Poor thing. You've been gripped by the hand of destiny, fated to face this unforeseen calamity... Not every trespasser will make it out alive.

t_ch: 不过你还有机会，只要遵循指示、心怀希望，诅咒的力量就能被化解……
t_en: But you may yet survive. As long as you abide by the instructions, keep hope in your heart, and the cursed power may yet be purged...

t_ch: 你这站台害人不浅啊。
t_en: This station of yours has certainly committed much evil.

t_ch: 住嘴！你竟敢心怀不敬，口出狂言，禁地会吞噬你！
t_en: Silence! How dare you utter disrespect from your heart and mouth! The forbidden ground will devour you!

t_ch: 请告诉我出去的办法…
t_en: Please tell me how to get out of here...

t_ch: 不用怕，迷途的羔羊，你不是第一个误闯禁地的{M#少年}{F#少女}。
t_en: Worry not, lost lamb. You're not the first {M#boy}{F#girl} to accidentally stumble onto this forbidden ground.

t_ch: 少看点恐怖片吧…
t_en: You've been watching too many horror movies...

t_ch: 什么？你应该感到恐惧，恐惧！既然你不打算害怕，那就体会痛苦的滋味吧！
t_en: What? You should be terrified, petrified! If you don't intend to be fearful, then experience the taste of suffering!

t_ch: 你成功直面了我，闯入者。或许现在我该称你一声「勇敢的人」。
t_en: You've managed to face me, intruder. Perhaps I should call you a "brave one."

t_ch: 多亏你一直遵照我的指示，没有违反禁地的规则，才能活着走到现在。
t_en: Thankfully, you followed my instructions and didn't violate any of the forbidden ground's rules — the only reason you're alive and here.

t_ch: 我违反了，有事吗？
t_en: I violated them. Will I be all right?

t_ch: 什么？你，你居然将我的劝告当作耳旁风！是时候代表禁地对你降下惩罚了！
t_en: What? Y—You dare throw my heed of caution to the wind! I will mete punishment unto you on behalf of the forbidden ground!

t_ch: 真是多亏了你…
t_en: It's all thanks to you...

t_ch: 我可以帮你这一次，但不能帮你每一次。
t_en: I'll help you out this time, but it won't be every time.

t_ch: 这都是你编的设定吧？
t_en: You thought up this backstory all by yourself?

t_ch: 什么？不…不！禁地和诅咒都是真实存在的，我这就证明给你看！
t_en: What? No... No! The forbidden ground and the curse are real! I shall prove it to you!

t_ch: 走吧，活着离开，然后将禁地的故事告诉其他人——让他们知道，对噩梦和美梦都要保持同等的敬畏。
t_en: Leave with your life, and tell others about the story of this forbidden ground. Let them know that reverence must be paid to both nightmares and sweet dreams equally.

t_ch: 唉，我堂堂流梦帮的副帮主，居然沦落到在大街上捡垃圾的地步。
t_en: *sigh* A dignified Dreamflux Gang vice-leader such as I, reduced to picking trash in the streets.

t_ch: 遥想当年，整个街区的人可都要排队向我们进献垃圾，再看现在，他们甚至不会垃圾分类！——可怜了兄弟们，还要来这种地方陪我受苦。
t_en: Back in the day, all the people on this street were queuing up to offer us tributes of trash. Look at them now. They don't even know how to sort their trash! I pity my brothers the most, who have to endure this suffering with me in this place.

t_ch: 维持现状只会越来越糟，必须要重建帮派…路过的，我问你，建立一个帮派最重要的是什么？
t_en: Maintaining the status quo will only exacerbate the situation. We must rebuild the gang... You there, let me ask you — what's the most important thing to rebuilding a gang?

t_ch: 当然是钱。
t_en: Money, of course.

t_ch: 拜托，你有没有动脑子在想？我们仨都是垃圾桶，要钱有什么用！
t_en: Please, can you even work your brain cells a little? The three of us are trashcans. What use is money?

t_ch: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
t_en: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

t_ch: 非常多的垃圾。
t_en: Plenty of trash.

t_ch: 我们就只有三个垃圾桶，装得下这么多垃圾？贪婪可是堕落的催化剂。
t_en: We're just three trashcans. How much trashcan we store? Greed is the catalyst of decadence.

t_ch: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
t_en: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

t_ch: 助人为乐？
t_en: Helping people out?

t_ch: 看不出来，你挺上道啊，想建立帮派，就必须和街坊邻里搞好关系。
t_en: You don't look it, but you're pretty sharp. We must forge cordial relations with the people living here if we're to establish a gang.

t_ch: 要让大家都明白，垃圾不仅不能乱扔，而且是需要分类的。
t_en: Everyone must learn that trash cannot be tossed just anywhere, and must undergo sorting.

t_ch: 「钟表匠」走后，原来的帮派四分五裂，我也没脸再打着流梦帮的旗号了，为了一个没有随地乱扔垃圾的流梦礁，咱们就叫垃圾帮吧。
t_en: After the Watchmaker left, the original gang splintered off, and I was too ashamed to even bear the name of the Dreamflux Gang. For a clean and green Dreamflux Reef, we should call ourselves the Trash Gang.

t_ch: 假设现在，新的垃圾帮已经初具规模，我们下一步应该做什么？
t_en: Let's pretend the new Trash Gang has already been established: What's our next step?

t_ch: 当然是抢钱！
t_en: Robbing people of money, obviously!

t_ch: 啧，能不能想点好的？我们垃圾帮是正义的伙伴，可不是地痞流氓。
t_en: Tsk, can you think of something less criminal? The Trash Gang is a righteous clan, not a bunch of lowly hoodlums.

t_ch: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
t_en: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

t_ch: 疯狂捡垃圾。
t_en: Collecting trash like there's no tomorrow.

t_ch: 我没重建帮派前在捡垃圾，我建了垃圾帮还在捡垃圾，那帮派不白建了？
t_en: Picking up trash before and after rebuilding the gang... what's the point of the gang then?

t_ch: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
t_en: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

t_ch: 找人打架！
t_en: Picking fights!

t_ch: 我们兄弟三桶，可不会做欺压百姓的打手，像你这样的想法，就是帮派必须剔除的杂质。
t_en: We three refuse to become brawlers that oppress the citizens. It's thoughts like yours that the gang must quell from our ranks.

t_ch: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
t_en: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

t_ch: 建个垃圾站！
t_en: Build a trash depot!

t_ch: 没错！建好之后，不用我们出来，垃圾就会源源不断地送到肚子里。
t_en: That's right! When it's done, we won't even have to come out ourselves, and the trash will keep coming on its own.

t_ch: 外面变干净了，前帮主所设想的卫生环境，也算是有了盼头。
t_en: The place will become cleaner, and we'll be one step closer to our former leader's ideal of a hygienic environment.

t_ch: 我见过很多人，你是第一个对帮派的理解如此透彻的，真是相见恨晚——愿垃圾分类与你同在。
t_en: I've met many, but you're the first who knows the gang's creed inside out. It's a pity we met so late... May the trash sorting be with you always.

t_ch: 重振帮派荣光！
t_en: May the glory of the clan be revived!

t_ch: 为了垃圾分类！
t_en: For trash sorting!

t_ch: 无尽的欲望腐蚀了这个世界，众生迷失自我，人变得像垃圾桶，垃圾桶变得像人。
t_en: Endless desire has corrupted this world, the masses have lost themselves, and people have become akin to trashcans, and vice versa.

t_ch: 为了拯救他们，必须要有一位钢铁的君王挺身而出，缔造一个秩序井然的乌托邦。
t_en: In order to save them, a king of steel must emerge, forging a utopia where order reigns.

t_ch: 孩子，和我一起拥抱「秩序」的世界吧！
t_en: Child, embrace a world of Order with me!

t_ch: 我只是路过的。
t_en: I'm just passing by.

t_ch: 碌碌之辈，不图上进，无视秩序，当受天罚！
t_en: Those who don't strive to improve and disregard order will be judged by the heavens!

t_ch: 我要跟家族举报你！
t_en: I will report you to The Family!

t_ch: 奸邪恶徒，叛离我主，无视秩序，当受天罚！
t_en: Vile evildoer, you betray our Lord and disregard Order. Prepare to be judged by the heavens!

t_ch: 你又算哪根葱？
t_en: And who in the world are you?

t_ch: 侮辱神使，口出狂言，无视秩序，当受天罚！
t_en: You insult the oracle, spout nonsense and disregard Order. Prepare to be judged by the heavens!

t_ch: 哦！拥抱秩序！
t_en: Oh! Embrace Order!

t_ch: 这年头，能有你这样大志向的年轻人已经不多了，我很欣慰。
t_en: Youngsters with your ambition are a rare sight in this day and age. I am comforted by your presence.

t_ch: 那么，我们现在就来制定新世界的法令吧——每当休息日过去，人们重新开始工作，疲惫与焦虑就会找上来，从而使他们陷入混乱。
t_en: Now then, let us lay down a new world order — when days of rest conclude and the people commence work again, fatigue and depression will encroach, causing them to be plunged into confusion.

t_ch: 为了永久性地解决这一难题，我认为，应该取消掉休息日，每天都是星期一——这样就不会因为休息日的结束而痛苦了。
t_en: In order to permanently resolve this problem, I believe we should cancel rest days, making every day Monday. Then they won't be suffering when the rest days end.

t_ch: 嘎嘎加班！
t_en: Overtime it is!

t_ch: 无视计划，擅自加班，破坏秩序，当受天罚！
t_en: Ignoring the plan, working overtime without permission, disregarding Order! Judgment be upon you!

t_ch: 我撂挑子不干了！
t_en: I quit!
